arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed double injury boost for Stuttgart clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Monday been afforded some altogether timely positive news on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that two leading members of the club’s…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid player gets married... at 18!
arts.sum: The relationship between Endrick and Gabriely Miranda reportedly began with a bet, as the model herself revealed in an interview. The love story between Real Madrid’s Endrick and Gabriely Miranda hit its highest point yet this Monday.

arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher joins Jude Bellingham in exclusive club after first Atlético goal
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid star Conor Gallagher has secured for himself a place in something of a special La Liga club. This comes owing to the midfielder’s exploits in Atlético’s latest outing.…

arts.ttl: Férland Mendy to renew with Real Madrid: contract and salary details
arts.sum: Last season, Mendy made a total of 37 appearances in all competitions, being the ninth outfield player with the most minutes (the fourth defender, with 1,147 minutes more than Fran García) and scored one goal - the team’s second in the 5-3 Super Cup semi-final win against Atlético in Saudi Arabia. Férland Mendy is set to renew his contract with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Neymar tells Real Madrid star Vinicius of “catastrophic war” and Kylian Mbappé “hell”
arts.sum: While Neymar’s friendship with Messi has been well known since their Barcelona days, the same can’t be said for new Real Madrid attacker Kylian Mbappé. On paper, an attacking trio of Neymar, Kylian Mbappé and Lionel Messi should’ve worked like a dream at Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Defender Dani Carvajal gives update on future
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender Dani Carvajal provides an update on his future amid speculation that Los Blancos may soon be in the market for a replacement.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Champions League match against Stuttgart
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Tuesday’s Champions League opener against Stuttgart. Midfielders: Bellingham, Valverde, Modrić, Tchouameni and Arda Güler.

arts.ttl: Woltemade on missing Stuttgart's European tour: "My time in the Champions League will come."
arts.sum: As 2023/24 Bundesliga runners-up VfB Stuttgart prepare to make their 2024/25 Champions' League debut tomorrow, one of the VfB's "left behind players" has registered his thoughts in an interview with Germany's preeminent footballing publication.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's ugly win, Real Madrid's midfield, more soccer news
arts.sum: In the Premier League, Arsenal got an ugly (but effective) win over their north London rivals, Tottenham, while Liverpool took a big step back with a shock home defeat to Nottingham Forest . In fact, Arsenal got Tottenham to play the sort of game they wanted -- one where the Gunners were more conservative, their wingers tracked back, their forwards worked harder, their defenders sat deeper to deny space and where Tottenham came up against a dense block of black shirts in the final third.

arts.ttl: Champions League - League Stage Game Week One
arts.sum: Warren Ashurst takes a look at the first round of fixtures in the new format of the Champions League and offers a score prediction for each game..
